subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast drawn from the fountainhead of certitude and been illumined by the manifest light of the All-Merciful! Thy radiant letter hath arrived [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استسقی من معین الایقان و استضاء من نور مبین الرحمن قد وردت رقیمه غراء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @law of pilgrimage, @firmness in the Covenant
